calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Ownership By Trust Of A Note For One Loan & A Mortgage For 2nd Loan
Off Calendar Jan-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Weaver for Ronald Chun. Juliette Cox for Victor Chun. Emilie Calhoun for Herbert Chew.

Mr. Weaver stated that the pending partition action would resolve all issues and that he saw no need to be before the Court today. Ms. Calhoun and Ms. Cox agreed that confirmation was needed from the Court as to who has title to the notes and as to who has authority. The matter was taken under submission. Ms. Calhoun's request to have any other outstanding notes be deemed assets of the trust was denied as it was not before the Court.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Clauzel.
